source.title: Temu Trustpilot and App Store Ratings (2025-2026)

extractions.claim: Temu holds a 2.0-2.5/5 rating on Trustpilot based on ~49K reviews, while Google Play rating is 4.5/5 based on ~11.4M reviews
extractions.evidence: Trustpilot: 2/5 (48,921 reviews). Google Play: 4.5/5 (11.4M reviews). Sitejabber: 2/5 (1,760 reviews). Trustindex: 2.4/5 (3,545 reviews).

verification.verifier_notes: Sharp divergence between app store ratings (prompted users, skew positive) and complaint-driven platforms (Trustpilot, skew negative). Both tell partial truth.

extractions.claim: Top Temu complaint themes on Trustpilot: product quality issues, rising prices/hidden fees, misleading promotions, refund difficulties, bot-only customer service
extractions.evidence: Reviewers report 'terrible quality devices rated 5 stars', prices creeping up, 'free gift for new customers' promotion misleading, 'repetitive template messages from customer service for weeks', 'Customer Service bots are all very bad'

verification.verifier_notes: Qualitative themes from multiple Trustpilot reviews in late 2025 and early 2026

extractions.claim: For comparison: Amazon.com rated 1.7/5 on Trustpilot (44,673 reviews), SHEIN has 350K+ reviews on Trustpilot
extractions.evidence: Amazon.com: 'Bad' 1.7/5 (44,673 reviews). Amazon.co.uk: 1.4/5. SHEIN: 350,062 reviews on Trustpilot.

verification.verifier_notes: Temu's 2.0-2.5 on Trustpilot is actually BETTER than Amazon (1.7) and comparable to SHEIN. This underscores that Trustpilot skews negative for all large platforms.
